Title: Machine Learning Ops Engineer
Description:
TUI Group is the world’s number one integrated tourism business.

The Customer AI & Rapid Prototyping department stands at the forefront of digital transformation at TUI, driving company-wide AI adoption. Our team develops innovative AI solutions and personalized customer experiences that create measurable business value and give TUI a competitive edge in the travel industry. We combine data science, AI prototyping, and strategic implementation to deliver both rapid innovation and sustainable personalization solutions. In our dynamic work environment, we foster a culture of experimentation and data-driven decision-making, while working closely with various business units to shape the future of personalized travel experiences.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Machine Learning Ops Engineer to support and accelerate AI adoption at TUI. You will develop, implement, and maintain machine learning models and algorithms, working closely with cross-functional teams to integrate ML solutions into production systems.

The team is responsible for a crucial product to enhance the customer experience with AI: Personalisation across TUI channels. As an ML Ops Engineer, you will work closely with (AI) Solution Architects and Data Scientists to build an architecture that enables near real-time personalisation of our customer journey from inspiration, over search to book.

Become part of our team - applications open! This role will be advertised for a minimum of 14 days but could close anytime after this time so don't delay!

About Our Offer


Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, bonus opportunity, exclusive travel perks & discounts, extensive health & wellbeing support, and more.
Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance and offer hybrid or remote working models.
A career to shape: Opportunities to upskill, reskill and grow your career. Access the TUI Tech Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
Expand your horizons: Participate in our tech communities and collaborate on global projects and teams.
Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation and the Sustainable Tech Community.


About The Job


As a Machine Learning Ops Engineer, you will be part of a cross-functional team that enables AI engineering skills and capabilities across TUI Group, aligning with TUI’s AI strategy. Being an AI enthusiast with a strong DevSecOps mindset, you’ll collaborate with your team to deliver solutions that challenge the status quo, taking full responsibility for your solutions from design to operation. You diligently care about the quality of your work, including proper documentation and security aspects.
You will contribute to projects that explore new ways of delivering value, solving complex business challenges, and meeting evolving customer needs. You’ll help bring prototypes to life on our platforms and support their transition into production by establishing robust operational guardrails. You will monitor and optimize the performance of deployed AI models and collaborate with engineering colleagues on AI-related tasks to deliver impactful, data-driven solutions.
You can articulate your thoughts and ideas and take the initiative to translate them into outcomes, ensuring alignment with business and technical teams together with the domain’s teams and the Group Enabler teams, you will research, evaluate, and test new approaches, processes, and tools, helping teams use them effectively. You will participate in Communities of Practice and collaborate on shared initiatives to grow your experience. You are eager to learn and grow in your role, welcoming support and coaching from senior colleagues.
You thrive in an international, multi-cultural team, constructively challenging and holding high expectations for yourself and others. You consistently drive for technical excellence, ownership, and self-organization at both team and personal levels. You are passionate about learning, acquiring new skills, and staying up-to-date with the latest developments in your focus areas.
Security is part of everyone’s job. At TUI, we practise secure behaviours first in everything we do.


About You


Created near real-time event-driven personalisation architectures to personalise the customer experience (ideally leveraging AWS Sagemaker and Personalise)
Built infrastructure to bring data together for recommender systems to surface the next best action at the right time to customers (ideally using IaC like Terraform and CI/CD pipelines with Gitlab CI/CD)
Experience in productionising and using various AI models and algorithms.
Experience in deploying AI solutions using CI/CD pipelines, API development and containers.
Strong programming skills in Python.
Understanding of machine learning/AI frameworks and libraries.
Hands-on experience with cloud technologies and services (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
Experience with monitoring and log collection systems (e.g. DataDog).
Experience with SQL and/or Snowflake.
Customer-focused engineer with a passion for crafting high-quality digital products, continuous improvement, and effective team collaboration.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with an understanding of the social, legal, and ethical impact of AI technologies.


From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.

We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.

Title: Junior Developer (Hybrid @ Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: IFS MWM / Clevest Developer

Seniority: Minimum 1 year

Type of position: Hybrid (in Porto, Portugal)




The amazing you, will have:

Basic experience or academic background in backend and/or frontend development.
Interest in enterprise platforms, integrations and mobile workforce solutions.
Knowledge of SQL and relational databases (Oracle is a plus).
Experience or familiarity with REST APIs and system integrations.
Understanding of JSON and XML structures.
Comfortable using Git/GitHub for version control.
Interest in low-code platforms, configurable systems and scripting.
Problem-solving mindset and troubleshooting skills.
Good communication skills and willingness to work in multicultural teams.
Fluent English (spoken and written).




To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

Experience with IFS MWM / Clevest platforms.
Knowledge of Oracle environments.
Experience with Postman, Swagger or API testing tools.
Understanding of Field Service / Mobile Workforce Management solutions.
Related certifications.




Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psychologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!







Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Innovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Robotics Software Engineer
Description:
Robotics Software Engineer (Autonomy/Navigation)




Want to work on a real autonomous robot operating in the field - not just in simulation?




A scaling agriculture robotics start-up is building an AI-driven autonomous sprayer designed for protected agriculture. They're focusing on on real-world autonomy in GPS-denied, semi-structured environments, where robustness matters more than demos.




They’re looking for a Robotics Software Engineer to design and implement the core autonomy stack, owning navigation, localisation, and on-robot performance from lab to field.




If you enjoy working hands-on with real robots, autonomy stacks, and challenging environments - keep reading.




What You’ll Be Doing

Design and implement a ROS 2–based autonomy architecture
Build localisation and navigation using sensor fusion across IMU, wheel odometry, and visual or LiDAR cues
Work with SLAM, state estimation, and path-following algorithms
Integrate perception outputs into navigation and spraying behaviours
Optimise real-time performance and robustness in GPS-denied agricultural environments
Support field testing, debugging, and continuous improvement cycles on live robots




What They’re Looking For

Strong experience with ROS 2 and Nav2
Solid C++ and Python skills
Hands-on experience with IMU integration, odometry, and sensor fusion
Experience deploying autonomy on real robots, not just research or simulation
Familiarity with computer vision pipelines in robotics




Nice to Have

Experience in agri-robotics, AMRs, or outdoor autonomous systems
Understanding of safety-critical robotics or fail-safe logic




Hybrid working in Porto, Portugal, with relocation support available.




Salary up to €49,000 + equity - dependent on experience




Want to build autonomy that actually works in the real world and help shape the future of agricultural robotics? Apply now for immediate consideration.

Title: Software Development| Python Developer
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description


Design and develop backend services and APIs using Python, ensuring scalability, performance, and reliability.
Architect and implement RESTful APIs that meet business requirements and technical specifications.
Develop and optimize database schemas, queries, and data models for both SQL and NoSQL databases.
Write clean, well-documented code following established coding standards and design patterns.
Conduct code reviews and collaborate with team members to maintain code quality and consistency.
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve technical issues in production and development environments.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle, from requirements analysis to deployment and monitoring.
Implement automated testing strategies and maintain comprehensive test coverage.
Collaborate with product managers and stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
Continuously improve system performance, security, and maintainability through refactoring and optimization.



Qualifications


Degree in Computer Science or similar.
3+ years of professional experience in backend development with Python,
Strong proficiency in Python and experience with backend frameworks such as Django, Flask, or FastAPI,
Solid understanding of RESTful API design principles and implementation,
Experience designing and working with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis),
Proficiency with version control systems, particularly Git.
Knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.
Fluency in English (spoken and written).



Additional Information

The Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Observability Engineer
HTML:
A Rumos Consulting está a recrutar um Observability Engineer para o Porto (regime presencial):


Perfil:

- Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática, Ciências da Computação, Matemática ou similar;

- Experiência profissional mínima de 3 anos na implementação e operação de frameworks de Observabilidade e plataformas de monitorização, nomeadamente na implementação e melhoria contínua de processos de observabilidade em infraestruturas, aplicações, ambientes Cloud e sistemas distribuídos;

- Experiência comprovada com ferramentas de observabilidade tais como Dynatrace, Datadog, New Relic, Prometheus, Grafana ou plataformas equivalentes de monitorização empresarial;

- Experiência na definição e implementação de estratégias de monitorização abrangendo Métricas, Logs, Traces, APM, Synthetic Monitoring, Real User Monitoring (RUM) e Alerting;

- Sólidos conhecimentos em ambientes Cloud como AWS, Azure ou Google Cloud Platform;

- Certificações relevantes em plataformas de observabilidade ou monitorização serão valorizadas;

- Fluência em inglês;

- Boa capacidade de comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal;

- Espírito de equipa e capacidade de trabalho em ambientes internacionais e multiculturais;

- Boas capacidades analíticas e de resolução de problemas;

- Capacidades de inovação, flexibilidade e adaptabilidade;

- Forte sentido de responsabilidade.


Trabalhar connosco:

- Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a Rumos Consulting conta com uma equipa de profissionais especializados em TI;

- Na Rumos Consulting, os consultores integram projetos altamente desafiantes, com base em tecnologia de ponta e nos mais diversos setores de atividade;

- Os consultores Rumos Consulting têm acesso a um plano de formação certificada, o que lhes proporciona uma constante atualização de competências técnicas;

- A Rumos Consulting, enquanto empregador, dispõe de oportunidades de emprego com base na equidade, integridade e diversidade. Tendo por base estes valores, trabalhamos para que que nenhuma pessoa seja discriminada com base na idade, grau de deficiência, género, estado civil, gravidez e maternidade, raça, crenças ou orientação sexual. Acreditamos nas capacidades de todos, porque temos no nosso ADN espírito de equipa e de entreajuda, empatia e respeito.


As candidaturas que reúnam o perfil solicitado serão tratadas logo após a sua receção, ficando as restantes registadas em base de dados para futuras oportunidades. A Rumos Consulting, S.A. é a entidade responsável pelo tratamento dos dados pessoais recolhidos neste processo de candidatura. Pode exercer todos os seus direitos de titular dos dados pessoais diretamente no Portal de Emprego da Rumos, utilizando o seu endereço de e-mail de registo ou o que referenciou no seu CV. Caso não tenha a sua password presente poderá recuperá-la para esse endereço de e-mail. Se preferir pode sempre contactar diretamente a Rumos Consulting, S.A. para exercício dos seus direitos de titular de dados.

Title: Senior Python Data Engineer
Description:
🚀 Procuras o próximo passo como Senior Python Data Engineer?




Então este desafio pode ser para ti.

Estamos à procura de um(a) Senior Python Data Engineer para integrar um projeto estratégico na área de índices financeiros, com forte foco em autonomia, qualidade técnica e colaboração direta com equipas de engenharia financeira.




🧑 💻 Como será o teu dia a dia:

Transformar lógica de negócio e código em notebooks em código Python robusto, limpo e pronto para produção
Desenhar e implementar fluxos de processamento de dados escaláveis
Construir e manter pipelines para cálculo de índices financeiros nas classes de ativos Equity e Fixed Income
Implementar camadas de qualidade, monitorização e notificações para garantir fiabilidade em produção
Fazer code reviews e garantir standards técnicos elevados
Colaborar diretamente com a equipa de financial engineering para perceber metodologias e requisitos
Produzir documentação técnica completa das soluções entregues
Trabalhar com autonomia total, desde o levantamento de requisitos até à entrega em produção




🧠 O que procuramos:

6 a 7 anos de experiência prática em Python, com forte foco em data engineering e processamento de dados
Experiência comprovada na construção de pipelines de dados em produção, incluindo ingestão, transformação, validação, monitorização e alerting
Capacidade de trabalhar de forma autónoma em equipas pequenas e sénior
Bons conhecimentos de SQL para query e validação de dados
Boa capacidade para colaborar com perfis de financial engineering e compreender conceitos básicos de finanças




⭐ Valorizamos ainda:

Experiência hands-on com a plataforma Dataiku (DSS)
Conhecimentos de financial indices, quantitative finance ou capital markets data
Formação académica com base matemática ou quantitativa




💡 O que oferecemos:

Projeto técnico desafiante com impacto real no negócio
Elevado grau de autonomia e ownership
Ambiente colaborativo com standards técnicos elevados
Oportunidade de trabalhar numa stack moderna orientada a dados




📍 Localização: Porto




⚠️ Modelo híbrido: 4 dias por semana no escritório




Pacote Salarial Junior: 12.880€ a 21.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Pacote Salarial Mid: 14.000€ a 28.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Pacote Salarial Senior: 20.000€ a 49.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Title: Observability Engineer
Description:
Observability Engineer

📍 Porto (Híbrido)

🏢 wBrain

🌍 National & International Technology Projects




About wBrain

Na wBrain ajudamos organizações a garantir a fiabilidade, disponibilidade e performance dos seus sistemas através da implementação de soluções modernas de observabilidade e monitorização.

Estamos à procura de um Observability Engineer para integrar projetos nacionais e internacionais, contribuindo para a evolução contínua das capacidades de monitorização, análise de performance e gestão proativa de ambientes complexos.




Missão

Desenhar, implementar e otimizar soluções de observabilidade que permitam monitorizar infraestruturas, aplicações e ambientes cloud, garantindo elevada disponibilidade, rápida deteção de problemas e melhoria contínua da experiência dos utilizadores.




Principais Responsabilidades

📊 Observability & Monitoring

Implementar e evoluir plataformas de observabilidade e monitorização empresarial
Definir e otimizar estratégias de monitorização para infraestruturas, aplicações e sistemas distribuídos
Garantir cobertura completa de métricas, logs, traces e eventos operacionais
Desenvolver dashboards, alertas e mecanismos de análise proativa

🔍 Application Performance Monitoring (APM)

Implementar e gerir soluções de APM
Identificar e resolver problemas de performance aplicacional
Analisar comportamentos anómalos e apoiar equipas de desenvolvimento e operações
Contribuir para a melhoria da experiência dos utilizadores finais

☁️ Cloud Observability

Implementar práticas de observabilidade em ambientes cloud
Trabalhar com arquiteturas distribuídas em AWS, Azure ou Google Cloud Platform
Garantir visibilidade end-to-end dos workloads cloud

🚨 Monitoring Strategy & Reliability

Definir estratégias de:
Metrics Monitoring
Log Management
Distributed Tracing
Alerting
Real User Monitoring (RUM)
Synthetic Monitoring
Apoiar iniciativas de melhoria contínua da fiabilidade dos sistemas

🤝 Collaboration

Trabalhar em conjunto com equipas de:
DevOps
Cloud
Infraestrutura
Desenvolvimento
SRE
Apoiar processos de troubleshooting e análise de incidentes




Requisitos Técnicos

3+ anos de experiência em Observability, Monitoring ou áreas similares
Experiência comprovada em implementação e operação de plataformas de observabilidade
Conhecimentos sólidos em:
Metrics
Logs
Traces
Alerting
APM
RUM
Synthetic Monitoring
Experiência com uma ou mais das seguintes ferramentas:
Dynatrace
Datadog
New Relic
Prometheus
Grafana
Plataformas equivalentes
Conhecimentos de ambientes cloud:
AWS
Azure
Google Cloud Platform
Inglês profissional (obrigatório)




Valorizado

Certificações em plataformas de observabilidade ou monitorização
Experiência em ambientes enterprise de elevada criticidade
Conhecimentos de SRE e Reliability Engineering
Experiência em sistemas distribuídos e arquiteturas cloud-native




Soft Skills

Forte capacidade analítica
Excelente capacidade de resolução de problemas
Espírito de equipa
Boa comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal
Capacidade de adaptação a ambientes dinâmicos
Sentido de responsabilidade e ownership




Modelo de Trabalho

📍 Porto (Híbrido)

🏢 Regime híbrido

🌍 Projetos nacionais e internacionais




📩 Candidaturas

Envia o teu CV atualizado para:

andre.cabral@wbrain.global

We create a safe and inclusive environment where opportunities are equal for everyone. We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability, or any factor other than merit.

If you want to work in a place where every line of code matters, learn something new every day, and leave your mark, come join us on this mission. #DareToChange




We’re looking for a Junior Data Engineer to join our growing data team and help build reliable, scalable data pipelines that power business decisions.




Dare to Have:

Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Informatics, or similar
Up to 2 years of experience (internships included) in data-related roles
Basic knowledge of SQL and data modeling concepts
Experience with at least one programming language (Python preferred)
Understanding of ETL/ELT processes
Familiarity with databases (relational and/or NoSQL)
Eagerness to learn and grow in the data engineering field
Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail




Nice to Have:

Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Experience with data tools (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Spark)
Knowledge of data warehousing concepts
Familiarity with version control (Git)

Title: Platform Engineer (Analytics, Data & AI)
Description:
Want to know how a leading workplace experience and facility management company is powered by technology?

At ISS Tech Team, we create smarter workplace experiences through technology. Our Global Technology Solutions team builds digital solutions, from sensors and IoT devices to data, analytics and AI-driven capabilities, that support our ISS A/S operations across Cleaning, Workplace, Food and Technical Services.

With tech hubs in Copenhagen, Warsaw, and Porto, and teams collaborating across more than 30 countries, our ISS Tech team develops our digital solutions that have a real impact on both our customers and our people.

Location: Porto, Portugal or Warsaw, Poland

Work regime: Hybrid

The Job Role as Sr. Platform Engineer (Analytics, Data & AI):

We are seeking an experienced DevOps Engineer/IT Engineer with strong experience in Azure services to join our team. The ideal candidate will play an important role in managing, automating, and improving our cloud infrastructure, with a focus on function apps, storages and databricks on Azure. You will collaborate closely with the development and project teams from our Analytics, Data & AI area. These platforms have a global scale.

What You’ll Do


Design, implement, and maintain scalable and secure infrastructure in Microsoft Azure, including Azure Resource Manager (ARM), Virtual Networks, Subnets, Private Endpoints, Private DNS, Azure Storage, Azure Key Vault, Azure Event Grid, Azure Monitor, Diagnostic Settings, and Azure Container Instances.
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, including self‑hosted agents, artifact management, and automated pipeline execution.
Monitor and improve system health and performance using Prometheus, Grafana, Check_MK, Azure Monitor, and logging frameworks.
Define, implement, and maintain security controls aligned with ISS standards (RBAC, managed identities, service principals, NSGs, secure service-to-service communication).
Optimize infrastructure costs and performance using Azure Cost Management and related tooling.
Develop automation and integrations using Python scripts, REST APIs, and Azure SDKs.
Support Azure‑based data platform components, including Azure Databricks, Unity Catalog, Delta Live Tables (DLT), Databricks Workflows/Jobs, and data governance/permissions.
Troubleshoot complex issues across infrastructure, networking, CI/CD, and application layers.
Participate in Agile/Scrum processes and contribute to ongoing improvements within the team.


Key Qualifications

Must have:


Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer or a similar role focused on cloud infrastructure.
Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including architecture fundamentals (Subscriptions, Resource Groups, networking, compute, load balancers, security, monitoring).
Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or GitOps tooling.
Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions.
English proficiency, both written and spoken.


Nice Have


Experience with monitoring, logging, and alerting tools (Azure Monitor, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack).
Strong scripting/automation skills (Python, Bash), including API integrations and Azure SDK usage.
Understanding of cost, security, and performance optimization in Azure environments.
Experience with Azure Databricks, Unity Catalog, DLT, and data governance.
Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams.


Personal Skills


Excellent analytical and problem‑solving abilities.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a cross‑functional environment.
Strong communication skills, including direct customer interaction experience.


What ISS Offers You


Permanent contract.
Competive package, including private Health Insurance.
22 days of annual leave per year +3 company leave days.
Flexible working hours & hybrid work model.
Continues training (Technical and behavioral development).
Modern, well-equipped office in the heart the city of Porto.
Free parking.
ISS Tech Team Communities.
Free access to company Gym.
Snacks and drinks at the office.


Why ISS

At ISS, we are more than just a service provider of cleaning, food, workplace and technical services, we are a partner in our customers’ success. By creating exceptional service moments and transforming workplaces into spaces where employees feel valued, engaged and productive, we enhance productivity and help our customers to attract talent and grow their businesses. This begins with our own people through training, career development, and a supportive culture – empowering them to deliver outstanding service. We know that when our people thrive, they create spaces where our customers’ employees and businesses thrive too.

ISS is a Place to Be You.

Be who you are. Become what you want. Be part of something bigger.

Become more. Become ISS.

ISS seeks to BE a place of belonging and CREATE places where every person is welcomed, embraced, and valued for exactly who they are. Places where people feel safe, respected, represented, and supported as their authentic selves.

Title: Junior Apex Developer (Hibrido, Porto)
Description:
Descrição da Empresa

A Shore é uma empresa portuguesa de tecnologia que liga talento a inovação desde 2007. Especializada na gestão de talento tecnológico, deu em 2026 um novo salto, expandindo a sua oferta para áreas de Software Engineering, Data & AI e IT Core Services, posicionando-se como um parceiro end-to-end na transformação digital. Trabalhamos com alguns dos principais players de setores como banca, telecomunicações, saúde e setor público, desenvolvendo soluções escaláveis, orientadas a dados e com impacto real no negócio. Na Shore, combinamos know-how técnico, cultura de proximidade e foco nas pessoas para construir tecnologia com propósito e equipas preparadas para o futuro.

Descrição da Função

Principais Responsabilidades: Desenvolver e manter aplicações utilizando Oracle Forms e Oracle APEX. Desenvolver e otimizar procedures, packages e queries em PL/SQL. Desenvolver funcionalidades de interface utilizando JavaScript quando necessário. Criar e manter WebServices e processos de integração de dados entre sistemas. Desenvolver relatórios e documentos utilizando BI Publisher. Elaborar e apoiar na preparação de especificações técnicas para desenvolvimento aplicacional. Participar em projetos relacionados com faturação hospitalar e sistemas da área da saúde. Utilizar ferramentas de versionamento de código (SVN e Git). Utilizar ferramentas de gestão e acompanhamento de tarefas como Jira e Confluence. Apoiar a monitorização e análise de desempenho de sistemas através de ferramentas como Grafana, Prometheus e RabbitMQ. Requisitos mínimos Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática ou área similar, podendo ser complementada com pós-graduação ou mestrado. Experiência profissional mínima de 1 ano na área da saúde em Portugal. Experiência em desenvolvimento em Oracle Forms e Oracle APEX (versão 18.2 ou superior). Experiência em bases de dados Oracle (8i, 12c ou 19c). Experiência em PL/SQL e Javascript. Experiência em BI Publisher. Experiência em WebServices e integração de dados. Experiência com SVN e Git para versionamento de código. Experiência com ferramentas de monitorização como Grafana, Prometheus e RabbitMQ.

Localização


Porto, Portugal

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Role Overview




In this role, you will plan, design, develop and maintain high-performing data pipelines, machine learning services, and cloud infrastructure that power ML-based products.

Your primary focus will be on building robust ML infrastructure, deploying and monitoring traditional ML models, and ensuring seamless integration with our data ecosystem.




Responsibilities:

Plan, design, develop, and maintain scalable and high-performing data pipelines and ML infrastructure
Lead the development and deployment of machine learning services and APIs
Develop and maintain end-to-end (E2E) ML pipelines from data ingestion to model deployment
Implement and maintain code quality standards, data quality checks, and comprehensive testing frameworks
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
Work with GenAI platform framework for all generative AI implementations




Requirements:

Degree in Computer Engineering, IT, or similar field
Minimum of 5 years of working experience as a Backend Engineer and/or Machine Learning Engineer
Fluency in English: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
Strong ability to write robust, production-grade code in Python or similar languages
Experience developing end-to-end ML pipelines and workflows
Experience developing and deploying APIs for machine learning models
Experience with MLOps frameworks such as MLFlow, KubeFlow, or similar
Experience with AWS solutions, particularly SageMaker and other ML services
Strong understanding of ML model lifecycle management and deployment strategies
Knowledge of containerization and orchestration technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)

Job Description

We're looking for an exceptional Fullstack Developer to join our innovative team. As a Rockstar Fullstack Developer, you will design, develop, and deploy cutting-edge applications leveraging Python, artificial intelligence, and Google Cloud Platform technologies. You'll work on complex, scalable solutions that combine backend robustness with engaging frontend experiences, while integrating AI capabilities to drive business value. This is an opportunity to make a significant impact in a fast-paced, forward-thinking organization where your technical expertise and creative problem-solving will be highly valued.


Design and develop fullstack applications using Python and React, ensuring code quality and maintainability.
Architect and implement cloud-native solutions on Google Cloud Platform, optimizing for performance, scalability, and cost-efficiency.
Integrate artificial intelligence and machine learning models into applications to enhance functionality and user experience.
Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices that support seamless communication across application layers.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product managers, designers, and other developers to translate requirements into technical solutions.
Analyze complex technical challenges and implement efficient, innovative solutions using best practices and industry standards.
Optimize database design and queries for performance, ensuring data integrity and security.
Implement CI/CD pipelines and automation to streamline development and deployment processes.
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and knowledge sharing.
Stay current with emerging technologies and industry trends, particularly in AI, cloud computing, and fullstack development.



Qualifications


7+ years of professional fullstack development experience with proven expertise in both frontend and backend technologies.
Advanced proficiency in Python for backend development, including experience with frameworks such as Django or FastAPI.
Strong expertise in React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript for frontend development.
Demonstrated experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services and cloud architecture.
Proven experience integrating artificial intelligence and machine learning capabilities into production applications.
Strong proficiency in designing and developing RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
Solid understanding of database design, optimization, and management (SQL and NoSQL).
Expertise with version control systems, particularly Git, and collaborative development workflows.
Familiarity with Agile and Scrum methodologies.
Knowledge of security best practices, authentication, and authorization mechanisms.
Experience with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) and infrastructure-as-code principles.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.
Experience with performance optimization and scalability challenges.
Fluency in English (spoken and written).

Title: Junior Developer - Marketing Tech
Description:
Farfetch is a leading global marketplace for the luxury fashion industry, connecting customers in over 190 countries with items from more than 50 countries and over 1,400 of the world’s best brands and charming boutiques from around the world. Farfetch opens a world of luxury for endless expressions of style, delivering a truly unique shopping experience and access to the most extensive selection of luxury on a global marketplace.

MARKETING
We’re a diverse team of Marketing professionals, spanning artistic and scientific expertise. We’re driven to amaze our global community of customers through our data-driven approach, revolutionary spirit, test and learn culture and collaborative style. All for the love of fashion.

PORTO
Our office is near Porto, in the north of Portugal, and is located in a vibrant business hub. It offers a dynamic and welcoming environment where our employees can connect and network with a large community of tech professionals.

THE ROLE
We are seeking a highly motivated Marketing Tech Engineer to join our team, reporting to the Marketing Tech Principal. In this role, you will be a technical engine behind our marketing architecture. Working collaboratively alongside our Data, Product and Engineering teams, your remit is focused on the technology, data collection infrastructure, and automation that powers our marketing. You will support the development of our front-end tracking implementation, backend API connections, and the building of internal marketing tools. This is a perfect role for a developer who wants to operate at the intersection of software engineering and digital marketing, with the opportunity to explore agentic AI engineering.

What You'll Do


Tracking Infrastructure & Implementation: Work alongside our web and mobile engineering teams to maintain & implement tracking code. Ensuring our marketing campaigns receive pristine, accurate data.
Backend Automation & APIs: Utilize Python and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to maintain, troubleshoot, and improve marketing tools.
Technical Triage & Issue Resolution: Act as a technical investigator for the marketing team. You will dive into code to troubleshoot complex issues such as tag behaviour, server-side tracking, and Appsflyer mobile deep-linking.
AI & Internal Tool Development: Collaborate with the Marketing Tech Principal to build and deploy production-ready AI agents for internal use within the marketing org.





Who You Are


1+ years of experience in a technical or developer role, holding a degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a closely related field.
Hands-on development skills across both the front-end (JavaScript, HTML, CSS) and back-end (Python, SQL), with a good understanding of web protocols, REST APIs, JSON payloads, and webhooks.
Highly curious with a growth mindset; you are specifically interested in AI agents, context & prompt engineering, and multi-agent systems.
A fast learner who enjoys being exposed to new technologies and concepts.
(Bonus) Experience in web and app tracking implementation and tag management (Google Tag Manager + mobile measurement platforms like Appsflyer).
(Bonus) Solid experience with DevOps and CI/CD tools such as GitHub, as well as deploying containerized applications using Docker.
(Bonus) Experience with cloud computing, ideally GCP, but if not an equivalent, such as Azure or AWS.





Rewards & Benefits


Health insurance for the whole family, flexible working environment and well-being support and tools
Extra days off, sabbatical program and days for you to give back for the community
Training opportunities and free access to Udemy
Flexible benefits program





EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES STATEMENT & SCAM DISCLAIMER


EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES STATEMENT- Farfetch is an equal opportunities employer ensuring that all applicants are treated equally and fairly throughout our recruitment process. We are determined that no applicant experiences discrimination on the basis of sex, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, disability, age, gender identity, ancestry, sexual orientation, veteran status, marriage and civil partnership, pregnancy and maternity, or any other basis prohibited by applicable law.
SCAM DISCLAIMER- It has come to our attention that there may be fraudulent activities involving individuals or organizations falsely claiming to represent Farfetch in order to attract candidates to a SCAM. Please be aware that Farfetch does not conduct recruitment processes through messaging apps or any unofficial communication channels, other than our official careers website. Additionally, Farfetch will never ask candidates for any form of payment during the recruitment process





We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
TUI Group is the world’s number one integrated tourism business.

The Customer AI & Rapid Prototyping department stands at the forefront of digital transformation at TUI, driving company-wide AI adoption. Our team develops innovative AI solutions and personalized customer experiences that create measurable business value and give TUI a competitive edge in the travel industry. We combine data science, AI prototyping, and strategic implementation to deliver both rapid innovation and sustainable personalization solutions. In our dynamic work environment, we foster a culture of experimentation and data-driven decision-making, while working closely with various business units to shape the future of personalized travel experiences.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Senior Machine Learning Engineer to help leverage AI and advanced analytics to better understand our customers, deliver personalized experiences, and drive business growth through data-driven decision-making

The team is responsible for features which drive customer engagement and conversion in TUI and Partner Channels. These include multi-agent chatbots, AI driven inspiration and AI Search Capabilities. As a Senior ML Engineer, you will collaborate with (AI) Solution Architects, Data Scientists, and data engineers to enhance our product vector databases and enable an AI-driven search that can match a customer and their intent with the perfect holiday.

Become part of our team - applications open! This role will be advertised for a minimum of 14 days but could close anytime after this time so don't delay!

About Our Offer


Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, bonus opportunity, exclusive travel perks & discounts, extensive health & wellbeing support, and more.
Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance and offer hybrid or remote working models.
A career to shape: Opportunities to upskill, reskill and grow your career. Access the TUI Tech Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
Expand your horizons: Participate in our tech communities and collaborate on global projects and teams.
Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation and the Sustainable Tech Community.


About The Job


As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will be part of a cross-functional team that enables AI engineering skills and capabilities across TUI Group, aligning with TUI’s AI strategy. Being an AI enthusiast with a strong DevSecOps mindset, you’ll collaborate with your team to deliver solutions that challenge the status quo, taking full responsibility for your AI solutions from design to operation. You diligently care about the quality of your work, including proper documentation and security aspects.
You will collaborate closely with our App, Web, and CRM teams to leverage AI and advanced analytics to better understand customer behavior, deliver personalized experiences, and support business growth. Your work will contribute to seamless, engaging customer interactions that drive satisfaction and bookings, ensuring customers feel understood and valued.
You can articulate your thoughts and ideas and take the initiative to translate them into outcomes, ensuring alignment with business and technical teams together with the domain’s teams and the Group Enabler teams, you will research, evaluate, and test new approaches, processes, and tools, helping teams use them effectively. You will participate in Communities of Practice and collaborate on shared initiatives to grow your experience. You are eager to learn and grow in your role, welcoming support and coaching from senior colleagues.
You thrive in an international, multi-cultural team, constructively challenging and holding high expectations for yourself and others.
You consistently drive for technical excellence, ownership, and self-organization at both team and personal levels. You are passionate about learning, acquiring new skills, and staying up-to-date with the latest developments in your focus areas.
Security is part of everyone’s job. At TUI, we practise secure behaviours first in everything we do.


About You


Experienced with GenAI (ideally AWS Bedrock) for intent recognition and building multi-agent solutions that connect customers to our products using natural language
Built vector stores and graphs in collaboration with data scientists to leverage information to find products based on natural language (e.g. using OpenSearch)
Experience in designing, implementing, deploying and using various AI models and algorithms
Experience in deploying AI solutions (e.g. CI/CD pipeline, API development, containers)
Strong programming skills in Python
Understanding of machine learning/AI frameworks and libraries
Hands-on experience with cloud technologies and services (e.g., AWS)
Experience with SQL and/or Snowflake
Some experience with RAG and Graphs
Comfortable with LLM evaluation and testing frameworks.
Proficiency in data preprocessing and feature and/or prompt engineering
Customer-focused engineer with a passion for crafting high-quality digital products, continuous improvement, and effective team collaboration
Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with an understanding of the social, legal, and ethical impact of AI technologies.


From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.

We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.

Title: AI Solutions Tech Lead
Description:
About the Role




At Symplifyr, we're expanding into applied AI for business processes, building solutions that combine automation, integrations and AI models. We're looking for an AI Solutions Tech Lead to technically lead our emerging AI implementation practice, acting as the internal technical reference and as a senior client-facing voice.




This is a cross-functional role. You'll be involved in discovery and solution design with clients, guide the team through execution, define stack and best practices, and actively contribute to new business through your technical expertise.


Tasks


What You'll Do





Lead technical discovery with clients: understand the business problem, map current processes, identify AI/automation opportunities, and design architectures that are both realistic and ambitious


Participate in project planning and estimation, ensuring technical feasibility and alignment with client expectations


Technically lead the implementation team, mentoring juniors and seniors on solution design, code reviews, architecture decisions, and tooling adoption


Continuously bring new ideas: models, AI frameworks, automation tools, emerging patterns, and help the team grow technically


Manage multiple projects in parallel, acting as the senior technical point of contact with clients


Present solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders


Identify upsell and expansion opportunities within existing accounts, in collaboration with the commercial team



Requirements


Who We're Looking For




We're open to Senior profiles (5+ years) or Lead/Principal (8+ years), as long as the experience demonstrates technical maturity and leadership capability.




Essential Technical Skills





Cloud services and cloud-native architecture design


Hands-on experience with AI solutions in production, with the judgment to choose the right approach for each problem (not everything needs an LLM)


Familiarity with the AI platform and API ecosystem (Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure AI, Hugging Face and equivalents), including model selection criteria around cost, latency, and data privacy


Strong integration and automation skills: REST APIs, webhooks, and tools like n8n, Make, Logic Apps — with the ability to decide between build vs. integrate


Full-stack development experience with a modern stack


Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD, and infrastructure as code





Leadership & Client Skills





Proven experience leading technical teams as Tech Lead, Engineering Manager, or equivalent


Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and clients simultaneously, across varying levels of technical maturity


Comfortable in business stakeholder conversations, able to translate problems into solutions and solutions into value


Consultative mindset: identify opportunities, propose approaches, and challenge requirements when it makes sense





Nice to Have





Experience in consulting or client-facing project environments


Knowledge of MLOps, production model monitoring, or systematic evaluation of AI output quality



Benefits


What We Offer





A leadership position in an emerging practice, with real space to shape how we work with AI


Direct client access and influence over strategic decisions in the AI domain


A modern technical stack with freedom to propose and adopt new tools


Collaborative, informal work environment with genuine autonomy


Hybrid work model


Projects with direct impact at large enterprises and leading institutions


Real opportunities for professional growth and continuous learning


Access to training and an active culture of knowledge sharing across teams


Health insurance included


Performance-based incentive plan tied to individual contribution





Ready to Apply?




If this challenge resonates with you and you want to work in an environment where innovation, collaboration, and autonomy are taken seriously — we'd love to meet you.




After receiving your application, we review every profile carefully. Selected candidates will be contacted for an initial informal conversation (remote). From there, the process includes a technical interview where we want to understand your experience and how you can make a difference for us and our clients, followed by a final interview.

Title: Lojista e Criador(a) de Conteúdos Digitais – Cosmética e Beleza
HTML:
Na 7Skin vivemos o universo da cosmética, da beleza e do bem-estar todos os dias — e adoramos o que fazemos!

Somos uma empresa de e-commerce (com loja física também!) e gerimos marcas como skin.pt, cosmetis.pt e farmacia.pt. O nosso objetivo? Tornar o cuidado pessoal simples, acessível e inspirador para milhares de pessoas.

Trabalhamos com algumas das melhores marcas do mercado e levamos a experiência do cliente muito a sério.

Por isso, garantimos:

  • Entregas rápidas (porque ninguém gosta de esperar por aquele creme novo!),
  • Preços justos e competitivos,
  • E uma navegação fácil, segura e sem complicações.


O que nos move:

  • Colocamos o cliente no centro de tudo;
  • Valorizamos a rapidez e a eficiência;
  • Construímos relações com base na confiança.


Se tens vontade de fazer parte de uma equipa dinâmica, focada e que gosta de fazer acontecer — então talvez sejas mesmo a pessoa que procuramos!

Estamos à procura de um/a Lojista e Criador(a) de Conteúdos Digitais para se juntar a esta aventura. Vamos?

AS TUAS RESPONSABILIDADES:

  • Oferecer uma experiência de atendimento personalizada e diferenciadora, compreendendo as necessidades de cada cliente;
  • Partilhar conhecimento sobre skincare, maquilhagem e tendências de beleza, ajudando os clientes a encontrar os produtos mais adequados;
  • Manter o espaço de loja organizado, limpo e visualmente apelativo, garantindo uma experiência de compra positiva;
  • Criar, adaptar e publicar conteúdos de produto para a loja online (descrições, imagens, categorias, etc.);
  • Escrever conteúdos claros, informativos e otimizados para SEO, alinhados com o tom e identidade da marca;
  • Garantir a correção técnica e linguística dos conteúdos, respeitando as guidelines internas e regulamentos do setor;
  • Trabalhar em colaboração com as equipas de marketing e comercial em lançamentos, campanhas e otimizações da loja online;
  • Participar ativamente nas dinâmicas da loja e da marca, trazendo ideias criativas e contribuindo para a valorização dos produtos e marcas representadas.


O QUE PROCURAMOS

  • Excelente capacidade de comunicação verbal e escrita (português e inglês);
  • Habilitações literárias ao nível do 12.º ano;
  • Experiência prévia no setor da beleza, dermocosmética ou bem-estar (lojas, perfumarias, farmácia, parafarmácia, etc.);
  • Experiência em aconselhamento dermocosmético;
  • Gosto e interesse pelas áreas da cosmética, skincare, beleza e bem-estar;
  • Boa capacidade de escrita e sensibilidade para criação de conteúdos digitais;
  • Conhecimentos básicos de SEO e familiaridade com plataformas CMS (preferencial);
  • Noções básicas de edição de imagem (Canva, Photoshop ou semelhante);
  • Autonomia, organização, atenção ao detalhe e espírito de equipa.


O QUE OFERECEMOS

  • Integração numa equipa jovem, dinâmica e acolhedora;
  • Horário fixo de segunda a sexta-feira, das 09h às 18h;
  • Formação contínua e desenvolvimento de competências;
  • Benefícios como seguro de saúde e descontos em produtos.


📍 Localização: Porto, junto à estação de metro da Casa da Música.

Title: Data Scientist (Híbrido @ Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: DATA SCIENTIST

Seniority: Minimum 4-5 years

Type of position: Hybrid (in Porto, Portugal)




The amazing you, will have:

At least 4 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
Strong foundation in statistics, probability, and predictive modeling.
Hands-on experience with Python (pandas, scikit-learn, NumPy, matplotlib, seaborn).
Experience building, validating, and deploying machine learning models (supervised and unsupervised).
Ability to handle large datasets, perform EDA, and apply feature engineering.
Solid SQL skills for data extraction and manipulation.
Experience using Jupyter Notebooks or similar tools for prototyping and sharing insights.
Understanding of model evaluation metrics (e.g., precision, recall, AUC).
Fluent English (spoken and written) – for effective communication with technical teams.
Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., GCP, AWS, Azure).
Familiarity with ML Ops tools (e.g., MLflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI).
Background in Deep Learning (e.g., TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch).
Basic understanding of ETL processes and data pipelines.
Experience in NLP, computer vision, or time series forecasting projects.




To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

Related certifications.




Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psychologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!







Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Innovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

HTML:
Present in more than 30 countries, BNP Paribas Personal Finance leads the personal and consumer credit business. In some markets we are leaders, and we bet on innovation to open up new opportunities, in others we are a fast growing business. In all markets, we value relationships, knowledge sharing and responsible action

In practice, your day-to-day

  • As a Senior Data Scientist you will use data analytical and visualization techniques to solve business issues in different geographies:
    • You will be able to produce and optimize data analytics models/tools;
    • Together with the development team you will ensure high-level of scalability for our engines and ensure code optimization (RAM, cores, any IT resource) to have light engines;
    • Run python-based analytical engines (Direct marketing, inbound marketing, Search) on a regular basis (monthly, weekly, daily) to serve countries and automate these run phases;
    • Mentor Junior members;
The Mission is important, but so is the Team and the workplace!

  • Welcome to BNP Paribas Personal Finance, where you will integrate the HUB Analytics Marketing, an innovative and creative department based in Lisbon and Porto. In both locations we offer a hybrid work model.
  • You will report hierarchically to the Team Leader. The marketing side of the Hub has 3 mid-sized teams (Data Scientists, Data Analysts and Python developers), working together on complex challenges.
  • The team is new and everyone is growing together. You'll be surrounded by more than 30 colleagues working in the same field as you, sharing ideas and experiences.
  • We are prepared to welcome you with an initial onboarding plan, with on the job training, online learning and networking opportunities.

Are you the one we are looking for?

  • Have a Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics or related field;
  • Have strong programming and scripting skills (Python), academic knowledge about machine learning, statistical analysis (AB testing, significance tests, etc.) and quantitative analysis skills;
  • Knowledge of development pipelines (git, CI/CD) and agile tools (Jira), databases (relational and graph – vertica, oracle, SQL server), experience with ETL, knowledge of BI/visualization tools (Tableau Software, PowerBI);
  • Have good skills on collaboration, communication, adaptability and initiative spirit, high focus on delivery, with detail-oriented mindset;
  • Fluency in oral and written English;
  • At least 3 years of experience;
  • Are you open for occasional travel in Europe?
  • If you have all this, a lot of desire, energy and good mood, then you are the one we are looking for ...
  • We look forward to your application!

Our commitments

  • BNP Paribas is an equal opportunity employer that is proud to provide equal employment opportunities to all job seekers. As a socially responsible company, we incorporate the principles of Diversity and Inclusion in our values and practices
  • To achieve all our goals, we intend to attract, develop, and retain different profiles, assuming diversity as an enabler and differentiator of innovation, fundamental in our organization

What makes us proud as reference employer?

  • Top Employer Portugal and Top Employer Europe certification, for the eight consecutive year
  • 93% of our employees identify BNP Paribas as a company with "an inclusive management that supports all kinds of differences (age, origins, sexual orientation ...)"
  • 94% of employees identify with and benefit from the "Smart Working" policy, feeling comfortable in a hybrid work environment, and with the digital tools and workspaces available
  • 71% of our customers are promoters of our brand

Title: Técnico /a de Mecatrónica Automóvel , Porto
Description:
What To Expect
Estamos à procura de Técnico/a de Mecatrónica Automóvel talentosos para os Centros de Serviços Tesla em Portugal. Na Tesla, a nossa Mecânica é o pilar principal da operação de Serviço, apoiando a nossa missão de acelerar a transição do mundo para a energia sustentável. Criámos um dos veículos mais inovadores alguma vez fabricado, e como Técnico/a de Serviço ajudará a assegurar um serviço igualmente inovador aos nossos clientes.

O que oferecemos:

Um ambiente dinâmico e rápido onde a inclusão, aprendizagem e colaboração são a chave para o sucesso

A oportunidade de trabalhar com tecnologia inovadora, ferramentas e softwares avançados

Formação e desenvolvimento contínuos para o ajudar a crescer as suas competências e carreira

Um pacote competitivo de compensação e benefícios incluindo acções da Tesla

O que oferecemos:

Um ambiente dinâmico e rápido onde a inclusão, aprendizagem e colaboração são a chave para o sucesso
A oportunidade de trabalhar com tecnologia inovadora, ferramentas e softwares avançados
Formação e desenvolvimento contínuos para o ajudar a crescer as suas competências e carreira
Um pacote competitivo de compensação e benefícios incluindo acções da Tesla



What You'll Do


Serviço, reparação e melhoria: Trabalhando com software específico Tesla e ferramentas avançadas, efectuará reparações e manutenção em todos os tipos de veículos Tesla, predominantemente sem supervisão
Assegurar a máxima qualidade: Repararar bem a primeira vez, confiamos em si para inspeccionar diligentemente os nossos veículos antes da devolução e pré-entrega e para trabalhar com os mais elevados padrões de qualidade
Colaborar: Trabalhando em equipas (locais e regionais) estará a partilhar apoio e melhores práticas, a fim de melhorar ainda mais a experiência de serviço
Desenvolver: Criando-lhe para o sucesso as nossas dedicadas equipas internas de formação irão treiná-lo em tecnologia específica Tesla e na reparação de Veículos Eléctricos
Treinar: Assistência a Técnicos/as Juniores, revisão do trabalho e tratamento de escalações complexas



What You'll Bring


Tecnicamente experiente: Tem experiência profissional na prestação de serviços e reparações de veículos, nos sectores automóvel, aeronáutico, marítimo ou similar
Tecnicamente qualificado/a: Idealmente, tem certificação relevante para efectuar reparações de veículos em Portugal. Tu irás auto-gerir o desenvolvimento das suas competências técnicas
Um/a bom/a comunicador/a: Fala e escreve bem inglês e/ou português e sabe transmitir o seu ponto de vista de forma clara e respeitosa.
Seguro/a para conduzir: Exigimos que seja titular de uma carta de condução europeia completa (Classe B para automóveis)
Flexível: Pode trabalhar por turnos para apoiar a sua equipa, que podem incluir fins-de-semana. Está disposto a viajar para reparações móveis, quando necessário
Elegível: tem o direito de trabalhar em Portugal

Title: Graduate Programme 2027: Data Scientist and Analyst
Description:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Graduate Programme

Our Graduate Programme is built for ambitious graduates who want to launch their careers in fintech. Over this 12-month programme, you’ll work on real projects, solve complex challenges, and make an impact from day one. With structured training and hands-on experience, you’ll grow your skills while exploring different areas of the business.

Top performers can be promoted during or after the programme, giving you the chance to continue your journey at Revolut.

About The Role

Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Scientists and Analysts work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for Graduate Data Scientists and Analysts who are analytical, curious, and ready to deliver impact with data.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let’s get in touch.

Join us from anywhere

The Graduate Programme is open to international applicants willing to relocate to one of our tech hubs in Poland, Portugal, Spain, the UK, or the UAE. We’ll support you with visa assistance, travel costs, and accommodation (conditions apply). You’ll be expected to spend around 3 days per week in the office (where role and location allow).

Key dates


Applications: open from May 2026
Recruitment process: July–December 2026
Programme start: early 2027 (January–June) or late 2027 (July–December)


Roles are filled on a rolling basis, so apply early. You can specify your preferred intake during the recruitment process.

What You'll Be Doing


Taking part in a hands-on bootcamp and working on real projects across multiple teams
Helping to build analytical tools and machine learning models (such as dashboards and ETLs) to support product launches
Improving visibility in user sign-up flows and operational funnels
Enhancing and maintaining data infrastructure (including ETLs and LookML) to keep data accessible and reliable
Collaborating with teams across Operations, Growth, and Product to refine features and uncover insights
Supporting decision-making with ad-hoc analysis (e.g., interest rate sensitivity, incentive profitability, conversion rates)
Learning from industry leaders and staying aligned with team priorities through weekly meetings
Managing tasks, tracking progress, and communicating key outcomes
Sharing updates with our global teams
Receiving regular feedback to guide your development


What You'll Need


A predicted or achieved 2:1 (or equivalent grade) in computer science, maths, physics, or a related field
To have graduated in 2025, 2026, or 2027
Impressive Python and SQL skills
A solid foundation in maths and statistics
An interest in analytics engineering, product analytics, data science, or ML engineering
Great problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset
Fluency in English and excellent communication skills
Full-time availability from early or late 2027
The ability to attend a Revolut office in your country of employment at least 3 days per week (this is a hybrid role)


Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.


Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.


We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Na Smart Consulting, vais integrar projetos inovadores onde dados e inteligência artificial são o motor da decisão. Procuramos um Senior Machine Learning Engineer com forte experiência em Python e foco em construção de sistemas de Machine Learning em produção.




👉 Este papel é maioritariamente focado em MLOps, ML Platform e infraestrutura, com responsabilidade em todo o ciclo de vida dos modelos — desde pipelines de dados até deployment e monitorização.




👉 O foco não será investigação ou desenvolvimento de odelos GenAI de raiz, mas sim operacionalização, escalabilidade e integração de modelos em ambientes produtivos.




Se gostas de construir sistemas robustos de ML end-to-end — vais sentir-te em casa.




🧑 💻 Como será o teu dia a dia

Desenvolver e manter pipelines de dados e Machine Learning end-to-end
Construir serviços e APIs para disponibilização de modelos
Trabalhar na operacionalização de modelos (deployment, scaling, monitoring)
Implementar boas práticas de MLOps (CI/CD para ML, versionamento, tracking)
Garantir qualidade de código, dados e pipelines (testing, validation)
Colaborar com Data Scientists para levar modelos da experimentação à produção
Monitorizar modelos em produção (performance, drift, falhas)
Resolver problemas em produção e otimizar sistemas existentes
Participar em decisões de arquitetura e escolha de tecnologias
Mentorar outros elementos da equipa




🧠 O que procuramos

+5 anos de experiência como Backend Engineer e/ou Machine Learning Engineer
Experiência sólida em Python (produção)
Experiência a construir pipelines de ML end-to-end
Experiência a desenvolver APIs para servir modelos
Forte conhecimento de ciclo de vida de modelos (training → deployment → monitoring)
Experiência com SQL e/ou NoSQL
Experiência com práticas de MLOps
Experiência com cloud (preferencialmente AWS)
Experiência com Docker e Kubernetes
Capacidade de tomar decisões técnicas e liderar iniciativas
Inglês fluente




⚙️ Stack Tecnológica

Linguagens: Python
ML & Data: Scikit-learn, Pandas (nice to have: TensorFlow, PyTorch)
MLOps: MLflow, Kubeflow (ou similares)
Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, S3, serviços de ML)
Containers & Orquestração: Docker, Kubernetes
APIs & Services: REST APIs (FastAPI / Flask)
Data: SQL / NoSQL
Infraestrutura: (nice to have) Terraform, CloudFormation
Observabilidade: Monitorização de modelos e pipelines (tools diversas)




💡 O que vais encontrar

Projetos com forte componente de dados e Machine Learning em produção
Foco em engenharia, escalabilidade e boas práticas de desenvolvimento
Ambiente colaborativo com Data Engineers e Data Scientists
Cultura de decisão técnica e melhoria contínua
Modelo de trabalho flexível

  • Experiência com cloud (preferencialmente AWS)
  • Experiência com Docker e Kubernetes
  • Capacidade de tomar decisões técnicas e liderar iniciativas

  • Containers & Orquestração: Docker, Kubernetes
  • APIs & Services: REST APIs (FastAPI / Flask)

  • Infraestrutura: (nice to have) Terraform, CloudFormation
  • Observabilidade: Monitorização de modelos e pipelines (tools diversas)


💡 O que vais encontrar

  • Ambiente colaborativo com Data Engineers e Data Scientists
  • Cultura de decisão técnica e melhoria contínua
  • Modelo de trabalho flexível

Title: AI & Data Academy (Porto)
HTML:
At CONKORD, we believe technology and people grow together.


If you're starting your career and looking for more than just an internship — if you want real impact, real projects, and real growth — this opportunity is for you!


We are looking for recent graduates who are curious about Artificial Intelligence, Data, and Automation, and ready to learn fast and contribute from day one.



Requirements

What you will do:

  • Support data analysis and processing in real project contexts;
  • Collaborate in the development of solutions based on AI foundation models (e.g., LLMs);
  • Contribute to the automation of internal and client processes;
  • Work on real-world technology projects alongside experienced teams;
  • Gain hands-on experience with modern tools and technologies.


What we’re looking for:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related field;
  • Strong interest in AI, Machine Learning, Data, or Software Development;
  • Basic programming knowledge (e.g., Python, Java, or JavaScript);
  • Analytical mindset, curiosity, and willingness to learn;



Benefits

What we offer:

  • Hands-on experience in real projects from day one;
  • Continuous learning and mentorship;
  • Opportunity to join CONKORD after the internship;
  • International and collaborative work environment;
  • Access to well-being and employee support programs.


Why CONKORD?

Because we don’t just offer internships — we build careers.If you're looking for a place where you can grow, learn fast, and make an impact, this is your opportunity

Title: Learning Coach
HTML:
Learning Coach – Centro TUMO Porto O TUMO Portugal está a expandir o centro em Porto e pretende aumentar a equipa de Learning Coaches.

Os Learning Coaches apoiarão os alunos do Centro TUMO Porto em atividades de autoaprendizagem, workshops e na gestão do centro.ResponsabilidadesApoiaros alunos na realização de atividades de self-learning, estando presentes no espaço para clarificar dúvidas e motivá-los;

Oferecerorientação aos alunos visando a conclusão das atividades de aprendizagem;

Acompanhara frequência dos alunos e fornecer feedback sobre seu desenvolvimento, tomando medidas para motivar alunos mais relutantes;

Prestarapoio nos workshops dados pelos especialistas das diversas áreas;

Apoiaras funções de Admissions Specialist e Marketing and Community Specialist;

Supervisionaros processos de check-in/out e acesso de cartão dos alunos;

Destreza tecnológica e facilidade na utilização de recursos e ferramentas online;

Excelentes competências de comunicação, incluindo escrita, interação pessoal e apresentação pública;

Competência para inserirdados, manter atualizado banco de dados, com atenção aos detalhes;

Bons conhecimentos de Microsoft Office;

Fluência em inglês e português, escrito e falado (fator eliminatório);

Experiência na área de educação ou experiência de trabalho com jovens (plus);

Disponibilidade para trabalhar presencialmente, em part-time, num ambiente jovem, de ritmo acelerado e multidisciplinar;

Candidaturas serão tratadas de forma confidencial.
